evaluators.name: Nearest Morning Oil Change Under $70 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked an oil change under $70 at the nearest 4.5+ star shop to 30301 for next Saturday between 9:00–11:00 AM.

evaluators.name: Brake Coupon on Front Pads Checkout Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the first qualifying brake coupon (>=15% off) was applied to a front brake pad replacement under $350 and that checkout summary was viewed.

evaluators.name: Civic Plan Longest Warranty Under $50 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that for a 2018 Honda Civic the user added to cart the plan with the longer warranty under $50/month from the first two shown, and then viewed cart and checkout.

evaluators.name: Engine Diagnostics Quote Earliest Morning Slot Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user requested an engine diagnostics quote at the 60601 location for a drop-off between 8–10 AM within 3 days, filled the contact/issue form, and chose the earliest available slot.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Same-Day Flat Repair After 6 PM Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a same-day flat tire repair after 6 PM at a shop open until at least 7 PM, choosing the lowest-priced eligible slot and, if tied, the earliest of those.

evaluators.name: 30k Service with Free Shuttle Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user scheduled a 30,000-mile maintenance under $200 at the nearest shop offering free shuttle within 5 miles, using shuttle visit with a pickup address.

evaluators.name: Email Gift Card $100 Checkout Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a $100 email-delivery gift card with recipient and sender details was added to the cart and checkout summary was viewed.

evaluators.name: Camry 3-Month Email+SMS Reminder Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a maintenance reminder schedule was created for a 2020 Toyota Camry at 25,000 miles, 10,000 miles/year, every 3 months, with both email and SMS notifications enabled.
